ratings.description: Trivial project or incomplete implementation
Meaningful application demonstrating 3-4 course skills
Meaningful application demonstrating 5+ course skills
Ambitious project with creative application of advanced techniques
Missing or vague descriptions
Basic descriptions present
Quality gates with structured, verifiable acceptance criteria
Specs thorough enough that another student could reproduce the build
Ad-hoc development without consistent process
Some test-first work, inconsistent approach
Full test-first workflow with appropriate complexity awareness
Sophisticated use of design exploration, specialized workers, and parallel execution
Minimal or generic setup
Basic configuration present
Rich, project-specific configuration with evidence of refinement
Config serves as a reusable template for similar projects
Unprepared or unable to explain workflow decisions
Demo functional; basic walkthrough
Clear demo, workflow walkthrough, and lessons learned
Engaging presentation with insights that benefit the whole class
< 10 commits, work done last minute
Sporadic commits
Consistent commits across the project period
Iterative refinement visible in commit history
